evidence: I love this show. Jay Hernandez is hot and the cast, stories and action are great.
This season has had both good episodes and not so good episodes. Pretty much like every tv series. It has humor, action, and drama.
Most of the episodes were good. Some were boring.
I don't like writing reviews about shows' season before the season is over.
I honestly thought season 3 was rather boring.
The star isn't as good looking as Richard Dean Anderson but this show isn't about looks.
Paul Rudd does a wonderful acting job and the support cast is great.
I was a fan of the old MacGyver.
I love the Flash! Awesome show! Awesome cast! Awesome episodes!
Awesome premiere & finale! Many good episodes in between.
I love this show! Makes me mad that it's been cancelled!
I will never forgive them for that.

summary: The user has a strong preference for action and drama genres, often expressing emotional engagement with the shows they watch. They appreciate quality performances but have mixed feelings about narrative complexity and pacing, indicating a preference for straightforward storytelling.
